Petition For Removal Of Trustees, Accounting, Appointment Of Successor Corporate Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Shain for Gregory Taylor (Petitioner). Neal McGettigan for John Azevedo and Thomas Kieley (Respondents).

Mr. Shain raised the issue of the two Trustees deleting all of the e mails between them and suggested the Court issue an Order to Show Cause for the Trustees show why they should not sign an authorization to Earthlink and AOL to release said e mails. Mr. McGettigan stated that his Clients were agreeable to mediation. The Court signed the order refering the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed by April 5, 2011. The Parties must report the outcome of mediation to the Examiner by March 29, 2011. The matter was continued to April 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a status conference/status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Removal Of Trustees, Accounting, Appointment Of Successor Corporate Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Continued To Jan-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Shain for Gregory Taylor (Petitioner). Neal McGettigan for John Azevedo and Thomas Kiley (Respondents).

Judge Wiss disclosed that in 2001 before she was appointed Judge of the Superior Court, she referred some of her pending cases to various Attorneys, that Mr. Shain was one of them, that Mr. Shain reimbursed her for the costs that she had advanced, paid her a portion of the Attorney fees for the work she had done, and that it would not effect her abilty to be fair and impartial. Counsel agreed to proceed. Counsel spoke of the Trustees positions, expressed that mediation may not be successful, and stated that discovery needed to be conducted. The matter was continued to January 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery. The Court encouraged Counsel to revisit the issue of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
